zh.lifeSummary: 當Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland於1009年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 克萊爾時，他的父親Tadc Mac Briain26歲，母親Mór O Mulloy20歲。他於大約1040年與Mor O'Hyne of Kilmacduagh在愛爾蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1086年7月14日在愛爾蘭庫迪 克萊爾吉拉阿洛享年77歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 克萊爾斯卡利福吉拉阿洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland于1009年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 克萊爾时，他的父亲Tadc Mac Briain26岁，母亲Mór O Mulloy20岁。他于大约1040年与Mor O'Hyne of Kilmacduagh在爱尔兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1086年7月14日在爱尔兰庫迪 克萊爾吉拉阿洛享年77岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 克萊爾斯卡利福吉拉阿洛。

nameMeanings.name: Ua
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Domingos, Fernando, Ignacio, Jesus, Ricardo, Roberto, Aida, Alberto, Amandio, Amparo.  Portuguese Joaquim, Anabela.
Galician and Spanish (Rúa): habitational name from any of numerous places in Galicia (Spain) so named, or a topographic name from rúa ‘street’.

Italian (also Ruà): topographic name from ruga ‘road, street’, or a habitational name from any of various places called Rua, as for example the locality so named in San Pietro di Feletto in Treviso province, or Ruà, as for example Ruà del Prato in Dronero, Cuneo province.

variants.name: Ruacho
meanings: Hispanic (mainly Mexico): perhaps a topographic name from a derivative of Galician and Spanish rúa ‘street’ (see Rua ).

nameMeanings.name: Briain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Brittain  .

variants.name: Brittain
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Anglo-Norman French Bretagne, Bretaign(e) ‘Brittany’. Some of the modern forms are from the Middle English Brytane, Brittan ‘Breton’; compare Breton .

nameMeanings.name: Toirdhealbach
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name, apparently from a byname meaning ‘instigator’, from toirdhealbh ‘prompting’. It was the name of a High King of Ireland who died in 1156 .

variants.name: Tárlach
meanings: Modern reduced form of Toirdhealbhach , pronounced ‘tor-lakh’.

en.lifeSummary: When Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland was born in 1009, in County Clare, Ireland, his father, Tadc Mac Briain, was 26 and his mother, Mór O Mulloy, was 20. He married Mor O'Hyne of Kilmacduagh about 1040, in Ireland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 14 July 1086, in Killaloe, County Clare, Ireland, at the age of 77, and was buried in Killaloe, Scarriff, County Clare, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland est né en 1009, à County Clare, Irlande, son père, Tadc Mac Briain, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mór O Mulloy, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Mor O'Hyne of Kilmacduagh environ 1040, à Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 14 juillet 1086, à Killaloe, County Clare, Irlande, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à Killaloe, Scarriff, County Clare, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland 1009 in County Clare, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Tadc Mac Briain 26 und seine Mutter Mór O Mulloy 20. Er hat um 1040 in Irland Mor O'Hyne of Kilmacduagh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 14. Juli 1086 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Killaloe, County Clare, Irland und wurde in Killaloe, Scarriff, County Clare, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland è nato il nel 1009 nel County Clare, Irlanda, il suo padre, Tadc Mac Briain, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Mór O Mulloy, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Mor O'Hyne of Kilmacduagh circa 1040, nel Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 14 luglio 1086, nel Killaloe, County Clare, Irlanda, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolto a Killaloe, Scarriff, County Clare, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Irelandが1009年にアイルランドコウントイ クラーで生まれた時，父Tadc Mac Briainは26歳，母Mór O Mulloyは20歳であった。約1040年にアイルランドでMor O'Hyne of Kilmacduaghと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1086年7月14日にアイルランドコウントイ クラーキラロで77歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ クラースカーリッフキラロにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland(이)가 1009년 아일랜드 카운티 클래르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Tadc Mac Briain(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Mór O Mulloy(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1040년 아일랜드에서 Mor O'Hyne of Kilmacduagh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1086년 7월 14일 아일랜드 카운티 클래르 킬라로이에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 클래르 스카리프 킬라로이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland nasceu em 1009, em County Clare, Irlanda, seu pai, Tadc Mac Briain, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Mór O Mulloy, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Mor O'Hyne of Kilmacduagh aproximadamente 1040, em Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 14 de julho de 1086, em Killaloe, County Clare, Irlanda, com 77 anos, e foi sepultado em Killaloe, Scarriff, County Clare, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland родился в 1009 г. в местности коунти клар, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Tadc Mac Briain было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mór O Mulloy, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Mor O'Hyne of Kilmacduagh около 1040 г. в местности Ирландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 14 июля 1086 г. в местности киллало, коунти клар, Ирландия в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности киллало, скаррифф, коунти клар, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland nació en 1009, en County Clare, Irlanda, su papá, Tadc Mac Briain, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Mór O Mulloy, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Mor O'Hyne of Kilmacduagh aproximadamente 1040, en Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 14 de julio de 1086, en Killaloe, County Clare, Irlanda, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultado en Killaloe, Scarriff, County Clare, Irlanda.
